text.title: QA Risk Matrix Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to build and refresh the risk matrix end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: enumerate-areas
step.input: Codebase module map + route map + customer-facing surfaces.
step.action: List 8-20 product areas at consistent granularity (auth, billing-subscription, billing-invoice, search, etc.).
step.decision-gate: Reject when count is below 5 or above 25.

step.name: score-impact
step.action: Score each area 1..5 on impact; write the worst-case rationale (concrete customer-or-business effect).

step.name: score-likelihood
step.input: Incident log (6m) + git churn + novelty (30d) + complexity proxy.
step.action: Compute likelihood 1..5 from data; record likelihood_data. Engineer adjusts ±1 with adjustment_reason.

step.name: map-quadrants-and-plan-investment
step.action: Assign quadrant (HH / HL / LH / LL). Write investment_plan entries for each quadrant (test types + cadence + owner). Run capacity_check.
step.decision-gate: Reject when any HH/HL area lacks an investment-plan entry; reject capacity_overrun > 1.5x without cut plan.

step.name: publish-and-validate
step.action: Run validate-qa-risk-matrix-method.py; post the matrix and plan to the team channel; index in the QA wiki.
step.decision-gate: Block publish on any validator violation.
